final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing avatar icon for a self-media creator covering new energy vehicles, digital gadgets, and everyday lifestyle products — suitable for all major social platforms globally.

Style/medium: clean flat vector illustration, modern tech-lifestyle aesthetic, icon-grade simplicity
Subject: a compact symbolic composition combining a sleek EV silhouette, a small digital device (phone or earbuds), and a lifestyle spark or leaf accent — unified into a single cohesive mark with balanced negative space
Composition: centered square composition with generous padding, optimized for circular crop at small sizes
Color palette: electric blue as primary tech anchor, fresh green as energy/eco accent, white or light gray background — no red-only or green-only dominance that could carry political or religious connotation
Text (verbatim): none
Constraints: must read clearly at 40×40 px circular thumbnail; monochrome version must remain legible; no human faces, no religious symbols, no national flags, no hand gestures; culturally neutral for both Eastern and Western audiences
Avoid: gradients that muddy at small scale; overly complex line art; any symbol carrying political, religious, or culturally sensitive meaning; generic Behance flat-icon clichés; stuffer aesthetic
